ddls:
CREATE TABLE "taxing_districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each taxing district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the taxing district */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the taxing district */,
  "jurisdiction" TEXT /* Jurisdiction of the taxing district (e.g., county, city) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the district was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the district was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tax_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax rate */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the taxing district */,
  "rate_name" TEXT /* Name of the tax rate (e.g., county, city) */,
  "rate_value" TEXT /* Value of the tax rate (as a decimal) */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the tax rate became effective */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the tax rate expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_rates_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES taxing_districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exemptions" (
  "exemption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exemption */,
  "exemption_name" TEXT /* Name of the exemption */,
  "exemption_type" TEXT /* Type of exemption (e.g., homestead, veterans) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the exemption */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the exemption was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the exemption was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exemption_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the taxing district */,
  "property_address" TEXT /* Address of the property */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., residential, commercial) */,
  "property_value" TEXT /* Value of the property */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the property owner */,
  "owner_address" TEXT /* Address of the property owner */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the property was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the property was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES taxing_districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tax_bills" (
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax bill */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "tax_year" INTEGER /* Year the tax bill applies to */,
  "tax_amount" TEXT /* Amount of taxes due */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the tax bill */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., paid, unpaid, delinquent) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the tax bill was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the tax bill was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_bills_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tax bill being paid */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., check, credit card) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_bill_id FOREIGN KEY ("bill_id") REFERENCES tax_bills ("bill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "delinquencies" (
  "delinquency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each delinquency */,
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tax bill that is delinquent */,
  "delinquency_date" TEXT /* Date the delinquency occurred */,
  "delinquency_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the delinquency */,
  "penalty_amount" TEXT /* Penalty amount for the delinquency */,
  "interest_amount" TEXT /* Interest amount for the delinquency */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the delinquency was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the delinquency was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("delinquency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_delinquencies_bill_id FOREIGN KEY ("bill_id") REFERENCES tax_bills ("bill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "revenue_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the taxing district */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "revenue_amount" TEXT /* Amount of tax revenue reported */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revenue_reports_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES taxing_districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exempted_taxes" (
  "exempted_tax_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exempted tax */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the taxing district */,
  "exemption_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exemption */,
  "exempted_tax_amount" TEXT /* Amount of taxes exempted */,
  "exemption_reason" TEXT /* Reason for exemption */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the exemption was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the exemption was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exempted_tax_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exempted_taxes_exemption_id FOREIGN KEY ("exemption_id") REFERENCES exemptions ("exemption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exempted_taxes_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES taxing_districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tax_rate_history" (
  "rate_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rate history */,
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tax rate */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the rate change took effect */,
  "rate_value" TEXT /* Value of the new tax rate */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the rate history was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the rate history was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_rate_history_rate_id FOREIGN KEY ("rate_id") REFERENCES tax_rates ("rate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "district_exemptions" (
  "district_exemption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district exemption */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the taxing district */,
  "exemption_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exemption */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the exemption was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the exemption was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_exemption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_district_exemptions_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES taxing_districts ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_district_exemptions_exemption_id FOREIGN KEY ("exemption_id") REFERENCES exemptions ("exemption_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_exemptions" (
  "property_exemption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property exemption */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "exemption_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exemption */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the exemption was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the exemption was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_exemption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_exemptions_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_exemptions_exemption_id FOREIGN KEY ("exemption_id") REFERENCES exemptions ("exemption_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "district_tax_revenue" (
  "district_tax_revenue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district tax revenue */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the taxing district */,
  "tax_year" INTEGER /* Year the tax revenue applies to */,
  "tax_revenue" TEXT /* Amount of tax revenue */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the tax revenue was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the tax revenue was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_tax_revenue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_district_tax_revenue_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES taxing_districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table affected */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record affected */,
  "changed_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the system setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the system setting */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the system setting was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the system setting was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)
